MoveObjectCommand - Class in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands
This class refreshed the cabin view without modifying anything.
MoveObjectCommand(Cabin, ArrayList<Row>, ArrayList<Seat>, ArrayList<Galley>, ArrayList<Lavatory>, ArrayList<Curtain>) - Constructor for class net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands.MoveObjectCommand
This command gets all physical object elements that are selected by the user, submits it via lists and performs the manipulation of the corresponding object inside the cabin element.
MoveObjectHandler - Class in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.handlers
